_schema.description: Catalog of componentized DuckDB-wasm extensions. Each entry describes one extension component built against the duckdb:extension world. The full planned roadmap (with per-extension batch + native-coverage notes) lives in PLAN-duckdb-extensions.md.

status_values.planned: in the roadmap; not yet scaffolded
status_values.scaffolded: tooling/scaffold.py has generated a skeleton that compiles

fields.requires_components: GENERAL component-dependency graph: ids of OTHER components this one resolves at RUNTIME via the orchestrator (the compose:dynlink linker = ducklink_runtime::compose_dynlink) as single shared resident instances. Models ANY shared component dependency (pylon/GDAL/s3-endpoint/any shared lib component), NOT a provider-specific category and NOT pre-composed. The resolver GATES the extension unavailable if a required dep is absent (not resolvable/resident); the host loads + keeps each required shared component resident via DUCKLINK_PROVIDERS=<id>=… before the dependent component's load.
fields.crates: upstream Rust crates wired in (see tooling/compat-registry.json)
fields.artifact: path to the built component under artifacts/extensions/

builtins._comment: DuckDB's own in-tree (C++) extensions, statically linked into the wasm core via cmake/wasm-extension-config.cmake (NOT components). See docs/duckdb-official-extensions.md. status: working = verified on wasm32-wasip2.

tpch.notes: dbgen verified (sf=0.01 -> nation=25, lineitem=60175); tpch_queries()=22; needs -D_WASI_EMULATED_SIGNAL

tpcds.notes: dsdgen verified at sf>=0.01 (income_band=20); needs -D_WASI_EMULATED_SIGNAL. NOTE: sf=0.001 hangs (dsdgen tiny-scale edge case, not wasm-specific) -- use sf>=0.01.

icu.notes: timezones + collations verified: AT TIME ZONE DST-correct (NY EDT/EST), 134 collations, default zone from TZ env (TZ=Asia/Tokyo -> Asia/Tokyo, else UTC) + SET TimeZone. wasm patches: tzname stub (wasi-shim.hpp), putil.cpp U_TZSET/U_TIMEZONE undef, double-conversion __wasm__ arch, emulated-mman link.

out_of_tree._comment: DuckDB's official extensions that live in separate repos (fetched via duckdb_extension_load GIT_URL). wasm32-wasip2 HAS sockets + TLS now (wasi:sockets via grafted wasip2 libc socket objects + openssl-wasm; see httpfs). verdict: working|gated-on-httpfs|hard|very-hard|infeasible.

inet.notes: host()/netmask()/broadcast()/<<= + IPv6 verified (duckdb-inet @fe7f60b). CAVEAT: bare INET-typed results render empty in the CLI (duckdb_value_varchar doesn't invoke the custom INET->VARCHAR cast); use ::VARCHAR. Affects any custom type; core-marshaler follow-up.

fts.notes: stem() + create_fts_index + match_bm25 verified (BM25 ranking correct). duckdb-fts @39376623, INCLUDE_DIR extension/fts/include (nested layout).

vss.notes: CREATE INDEX ... USING HNSW + array_distance NN search verified (exact match dist=0). duckdb-vss @c8a4efe, INCLUDE_DIR src/include.

excel.notes: CMakeLists find_package + vcpkg.json -> needs a vcpkg native dep built for wasi; no vcpkg toolchain. @8504be9.

avro.deps: duckdb/duckdb-avro-c fork (field-id API) + jansson + snappy, deflate+snappy codecs
avro.notes: VERIFIED: read_avro('manifest.avro') -> rows, with deflate, snappy AND xz-compressed manifests. Needs DuckDB's avro-c FORK (duckdb/duckdb-avro-c @8af40027) not stock apache/avro -- the extension calls avro_schema_record_field_id/avro_reader_reader/*_id (Iceberg field IDs). Built for wasi by scripts/build-wasi-deps.sh (jansson + snappy [from ~/git/snappy-wasm source] + liblzma [tukaani-project/xz] + avro-c with deflate+snappy+xz (codec.c patched: name+container); CMAKE_POLICY_VERSION_MINIMUM=3.5). merges libavro/libjansson/libsnappy/liblzma. @0c97a61.

sqlite_scanner.notes: sqlite_scan() + ATTACH (TYPE SQLITE) read real .sqlite files. Fixed via -DSQLITE_OS_OTHER=1 + a WASI VFS reused from ~/git/sqlite-wasm (cmake/sqlite-wasi-vfs/) registered by sqlite3_os_init. @833e105.

httpfs.deps: curl-wasm (libcurl+nghttp2/ngtcp2/nghttp3+brotli) + openssl-wasm + wasip2 libc BSD sockets + wasi:sockets
httpfs.notes: VERIFIED: read_csv_auto('https://...iris.csv') -> 150 rows fetched over HTTPS via wasi:sockets + parsed (avg SepalLength 5.843). S3 works too: read_parquet('s3://ookla-open-data/...') returned 4.87M rows (set s3_region to the bucket's region; the built-in S3FileSystem signs via SigV4 over the curl client -- no separate s3-wasm component needed). Works out of the box: curl is the default client on wasi (build script patches httpfs LoadInternal; the vendored httplib client COMPILES but fails at runtime -- non-blocking connect select/poll gap -- so SET httpfs_client_implementation='httplib' is not usable on wasi). Sockets: cargo-component builds a wasip1 core module (no BSD sockets in wasip1 libc), so scripts/build-libduckdb-wasm.sh grafts the wasip2 libc socket+binding objects (socket/connect/.../wasip2.c.obj/wasip2_component_type.o) into libduckdb-wasi.a; they import wasi:sockets/io/clocks which the host grants (inherit_network + allow_ip_name_lookup). Cert verification works secure-by-default: an embedded Mozilla CA bundle (cmake/ca-bundle/cacert.pem, 121 certs) is loaded in-memory via CURLOPT_CAINFO_BLOB (the build script patches httpfs_curl_client.cpp); verified that self-signed.badssl.com is rejected + valid certs accepted, no runtime --dir needed. openssl-wasm can't load a CA *file* (its stdio/file-BIO doesn't reach the host FS that DuckDB's wrapped open/stat use), hence the in-memory blob. @354d3f43.

iceberg.deps: avro extension + roaring (CRoaring); AWS SDK skipped on wasi
iceberg.notes: VERIFIED local AND remote: iceberg_scan('table', allow_moved_paths=true) reads real Iceberg tables -> rows (metadata JSON -> avro manifest-list/manifests -> parquet data). Remote over HTTP verified end-to-end on a pyiceberg-written table (20 rows, correct aggregates) via httpfs range requests; S3 works the same way. NOTE: remote uses the manifest's file_size_in_bytes for footer ranges, so the table metadata must be consistent (the duckdb-iceberg repo's test tables have STALE sizes -> only work locally where the real file is stat'd). pyiceberg names metadata 00001-<uuid>.metadata.json (DuckDB version-guessing expects vN.metadata.json) -> pass the metadata.json path or add version-hint.text. No AWS SDK: upstream guards it behind Emscripten; build-libduckdb-wasm.sh extends those guards to WASI (CMake STREQUAL + #ifdef EMSCRIPTEN->||__wasi__) and stubs AWSInput Head/Delete/PostRequest (AWS Glue/S3Tables REST catalogs unsupported; filesystem + S3 iceberg reads work). roaring built by scripts/build-wasi-deps.sh. AutoLoadExtension(avro) so avro must be present. REST CATALOG works on wasi: ATTACH '<wh>' AS x (TYPE ICEBERG, ENDPOINT 'http://...', AUTHORIZATION_TYPE 'none') and CREATE SECRET (TYPE ICEBERG, TOKEN '...') + ATTACH (... SECRET) both verified (config/namespaces/tables/LoadTable handshake over the curl HTTPUtil; bearer token sent as Authorization: Bearer). Covers R2/Lakekeeper/Polaris/Tabular (bearer/oauth2). AWS SigV4 catalog auth (Glue/S3 Tables) also WORKS: a self-contained SigV4 signer (cmake/iceberg-wasi/aws_wasi.inc, SHA256+HMAC, no AWS SDK) replaces aws.cpp's AWS-SDK path on wasi; AUTHORIZATION_TYPE 'sigv4' + CREATE SECRET (TYPE S3, KEY_ID, SECRET, REGION) verified against a signature-recomputing mock (byte-for-byte match). Vended credentials work: a REST catalog can return S3 creds + endpoint in LoadTableResult.config (s3.access-key-id/secret-access-key/session-token/region/endpoint/path-style-access) and iceberg builds a temp S3 secret -> httpfs reads s3:// data with no global S3 settings (verified vs a moto S3). Also verified: gzip table metadata (metadata_compression_codec='gzip'), time travel (snapshot_from_id/version), snappy avro manifests. WRITES work: CREATE TABLE + INSERT through an attached catalog (ATTACH ... SUPPORT_STAGE_CREATE true) -> the avro-c writer writes manifests + DuckDB writes parquet + the extension commits via POST .../tables/{table}; verified data persists across a fresh process (101 rows). All covered by tooling/iceberg_smoke.py (make iceberg-smoke, 15 checks: reads/codecs/catalog-auth/vended-creds/writes/CTAS). UPSTREAM LIMITS (the duckdb-iceberg extension itself throws NotImplementedException, not a wasm issue): DELETE (IRCatalog::PlanDelete), UPDATE (BindUpdateConstraints), INSERT into partitioned tables, targeted-column INSERT, RETURNING/ON CONFLICT, Iceberg V3 tables, DROP CASCADE. @49d67e45.

ducklake.deps: pure C++ (DuckDB SQL catalog + parquet storage), no native deps
ducklake.notes: VERIFIED: ATTACH 'ducklake:/tmp/lake/my.ducklake' (DATA_PATH ...) + CREATE TABLE/INSERT/SELECT, parquet files written under data/main/<t>/, metadata persists across a fresh re-ATTACH (6 rows, max_id 99). Pure C++, statically linked (no DONT_LINK), INCLUDE_DIR src/include. @45788f0a.

mysql_scanner.notes: transport solved by openssl-wasm; still needs libmysqlclient ported to wasi

postgres_scanner.notes: transport solved by openssl-wasm; still needs libpq ported to wasi

aws.notes: transport solved; AWS C++ SDK is huge

azure.notes: transport solved; Azure C++ SDK is huge

spatial.notes: Re-classified from infeasible. The geo stack links + runs with our wasi-sdk: GEOS (geos-wasm libgeos_c.a/libgeos.a, computed ST_Intersection area=4.0), PROJ (proj-wasm libproj.a + libsqlite3, EPSG:4326->3857 transform correct), GDAL (gdal-wasm libgdal.a 16.5MB) -- all libc++/wasm-eh compatible. Full geo link has only ~24 external gaps, nearly all stubbable: dlopen/dlsym/fork/execvp/pipe (wasi-missing, GDAL falls back), getpid/pthread_atfork/signal/mmap (stubs), + 4 sqlite3_ (column-metadata + load_extension -> fuller sqlite or stub). REMAINING BUILD (large): gather GDAL headers (scattered in gcore/ogr/port), provide find_package CONFIG/IMPORTED targets for GDAL/PROJ/GEOS/EXPAT, patch spatial CMakeLists EMSCRIPTEN guards -> WASI (SPATIAL_USE_NETWORK OFF), build a stubs lib, merge ~10 libs into libduckdb-wasi.a, handle proj.db at runtime. @a6a607fe.

extensions.name: sample_extension
extensions.description: Reference extension exercising every capability: scalar, table, aggregate, macro, logical-type, cast, and a replacement scan.

functions.name: sample_plus_one
functions.description: The canonical trivial scalar. Useful as a smoke test that ducklink is wired up: `LOAD ducklink; LOAD WASM 'sample_extension'; SELECT sample_plus_one(41);` should return 42.

functions.name: sample_emit_sequence
functions.summary: Table function emitting 0..limit as a single INT64 column.
functions.description: Analogous to DuckDB's built-in `range()`. Included so the sample component exercises the ducklink table-dispatch path.

functions.name: sample_sum
functions.summary: Aggregate: sum of INT64 input values.
functions.description: Included so the sample component exercises the ducklink aggregate-dispatch path. Behaves like DuckDB's built-in `sum()` for INT64 columns.

extensions.name: isin
extensions.description: ISIN (ISO 6166) securities identifier validation and field extraction. Luhn check-digit over the letter-expanded body.

extensions.name: baseN
extensions.description: Compact base-N codecs: base32 (RFC 4648, no pad) and base58 (Bitcoin alphabet) for BLOB<->VARCHAR. Decode errors return NULL.

extensions.name: luhn
extensions.description: Luhn (mod-10) checksum: validate a number and compute its check digit.

extensions.name: iban
extensions.description: IBAN (ISO 13616) validation + country/BBAN extraction via the mod-97 check.

extensions.name: ean
extensions.description: EAN-8/EAN-13/UPC-A barcode validation and check-digit computation.

extensions.name: aba
extensions.description: ABA routing-number (US) checksum validation.

functions.name: aba_validate
functions.summary: Validate an ABA routing number by its mod-10 checksum.
functions.description: The ABA routing number is a 9-digit code identifying US banks. This function verifies the check-digit (positions 1..8 weighted [3,7,1,3,7,1,3,7,1], mod 10 must equal position 9). Returns `TRUE` for a valid number, `FALSE` for a malformed one, and `NULL` for `NULL` input.

functions.name: aba_frb_district
functions.summary: Extract the Federal Reserve District number (1..12) from an ABA routing number.
functions.description: The leading two digits of an ABA routing number encode the Federal Reserve District: '01' = Boston, '02' = New York, etc. Returns `NULL` for an invalid routing number.

functions.name: aba_fed_region
functions.summary: Human-readable name of the Federal Reserve District (e.g. 'New York').
functions.description: Shorthand for `aba_frb_district` mapped to the district name. Returns `NULL` for an invalid routing number.

extensions.name: creditcard
extensions.description: Credit-card number validation (Luhn) and network detection (Visa/Mastercard/Amex/Discover/...).

extensions.name: uuidx
extensions.description: UUID extras: generate time-ordered UUIDv7, extract version + embedded timestamp (uuid crate). Named `uuidx` (uuid-extras has a hyphen).

extensions.name: crypto
extensions.description: Hash digests beyond DuckDB's md5/sha256: sha1, sha512, sha3, blake3, crc32.

extensions.name: markdown
extensions.description: Render Markdown (CommonMark + tables/strikethrough) to HTML or plain text (pulldown-cmark).

extensions.name: hashfuncs
extensions.description: Non-cryptographic hashes: xxHash32/64, XXH3-64, MurmurHash3 (twox-hash, murmur3).

extensions.name: rapidfuzz
extensions.description: Fuzzy string matching: fuzzywuzzy-style ratio (0-100) + damerau-levenshtein / indel / osa distances (rapidfuzz).

extensions.name: casing
extensions.description: Identifier case conversions: snake, camel, pascal, kebab, title, constant (heck). Named `casing` because `case` is a SQL keyword.

extensions.name: csscolor
extensions.description: CSS color parsing + conversion: any CSS color -> hex / rgb, plus validity (csscolorparser).

extensions.name: url
extensions.description: URL component extraction: scheme / host / port (with default) / path / query (url crate). NULL on unparseable input.

extensions.name: email
extensions.description: Email address validation + parsing: validate -> bool, plus domain / local-part extraction (email_address crate).

extensions.name: semver
extensions.description: Semantic version parsing + comparison: valid -> bool, major / minor / patch components, and compare(a,b) -> -1/0/1 (semver crate).

extensions.name: slug
extensions.description: URL-safe slug generation: slugify(text) lowercases, transliterates, and hyphenates (slug crate).

extensions.name: escape
extensions.description: HTML + URL percent encode/decode: html_escape / html_unescape (html-escape) and url_encode / url_decode (percent-encoding). NULL -> NULL.

extensions.name: natsort
extensions.description: Natural-order string comparison: natsort_compare(a,b) -> -1/0/1, so 'img2' sorts before 'img12' (natord).

extensions.name: roman
extensions.description: Roman numeral encode/decode: to_roman(int) -> text (1..=3999) and from_roman(text) -> bigint (roman crate). Out-of-range / invalid -> NULL.

extensions.name: humansize
extensions.description: Human-readable byte sizes: humansize(bytes) -> '1.50 MB' (decimal) and humansize_binary(bytes) -> '1.00 MiB' (binary) via humansize. Negative -> NULL.

extensions.name: ids
extensions.description: Identifier generators: ulid() and nanoid() (nondeterministic, use wasi random+clock), plus ulid_timestamp(ulid) -> epoch ms (ulid, nanoid crates).

extensions.name: idna
extensions.description: IDNA / punycode domain conversion: idna_to_ascii (Unicode domain -> punycode) and idna_to_unicode (punycode -> Unicode) via the idna crate.

extensions.name: mac
extensions.description: MAC address validation + normalization: mac_valid -> bool, mac_normalize -> canonical colon-separated uppercase (macaddr). Invalid -> NULL/false.

extensions.name: isbn
extensions.description: ISBN-10 / ISBN-13 validation + normalization (hand-rolled checksum): isbn_valid -> bool, isbn_normalize -> digits-only canonical. Invalid -> NULL/false.

extensions.name: humantime
extensions.description: Human-friendly durations: humantime_parse('1h 30m') -> seconds and humantime_format(seconds) -> text (humantime). Unparseable -> NULL.

extensions.name: iso
extensions.description: ISO 3166 country lookups by alpha-2 code: iso_country_name, iso_country_alpha3, iso_country_numeric (rust_iso3166). Unknown -> NULL.

extensions.name: morse
extensions.description: International Morse code (hand-rolled): morse_encode(text) -> dots/dashes (words separated by ' / '), morse_decode(code) -> text. Case-insensitive.

extensions.name: color
extensions.description: WCAG color math (parsing via csscolorparser): color_luminance(css) -> relative luminance 0..1, color_contrast(a,b) -> ratio 1..21. Unparseable -> NULL.

extensions.name: geohash
extensions.description: Geohash encode/decode: geohash_encode(lat, lon, precision) -> text, geohash_decode_lat / geohash_decode_lon -> double (geohash crate).

extensions.name: parsertools
extensions.description: Extract structure from SQL text (sqlparser-rs, generic dialect): sql_tables(sql) -> JSON array of referenced table names, sql_is_valid(sql) -> boolean, sql_statement_type(sql) -> first statement kind (SELECT/INSERT/...). NULL / false on parse error.

extensions.name: currency
extensions.description: ISO 4217 currency lookups by code: currency_name, currency_symbol, currency_numeric, currency_exponent (minor-unit digits) via iso_currency. Unknown -> NULL.

extensions.name: hmac
extensions.description: Keyed HMAC: hmac_sha256(key,msg) and hmac_sha512(key,msg) -> hex text (hmac + sha2). NULL arg -> NULL.

extensions.name: phonetic
extensions.description: Phonetic codes: soundex(text) and metaphone(text) for fuzzy name matching (rphonetic). Complements DuckDB's jaro_winkler/levenshtein.

extensions.name: jwt
extensions.description: Decode JWT segments (base64url, NO signature verification): jwt_header(token) and jwt_payload(token) -> JSON text. Malformed -> NULL.

extensions.name: totp
extensions.description: RFC 6238 time-based one-time passwords: totp(secret_base32, unix_time, period, digits) -> zero-padded code (HMAC-SHA1). Deterministic given explicit time.

extensions.name: baseconv
extensions.description: Arbitrary-radix decode: from_base(text, base) -> bigint (base 2..36), the inverse of DuckDB's built-in to_base(). Case-insensitive; unparseable -> NULL.

extensions.name: emoji
extensions.description: Emoji lookups (emojis crate): emoji_name(emoji), emoji_shortcode(emoji), emoji_char(shortcode). Unknown -> NULL.

extensions.name: whatlang
extensions.description: Natural-language detection: detect_language -> ISO 639-3 code, detect_language_name -> English name, detect_script -> script (whatlang). Undetectable -> NULL.

extensions.name: ipaddr
extensions.description: IP address validation + classification (std::net): ip_valid -> bool, ip_version -> 4/6, ip_is_private -> bool (RFC 1918 v4 / unique-local v6). Invalid -> NULL/false.

extensions.name: mime
extensions.description: Filename -> MIME type: mime_type(path) and mime_from_ext(ext) via mime_guess. Unknown -> NULL.

extensions.name: pluralize
extensions.description: English inflection: pluralize(word) and singularize(word), handling irregulars (person/people, child/children) via pluralizer. NULL -> NULL.

extensions.name: haversine
extensions.description: Great-circle distance (hand-rolled Haversine): haversine_km / haversine_mi (lat1,lon1,lat2,lon2). DuckDB core has no distance fn. NULL arg -> NULL.

extensions.name: numwords
extensions.description: Spell out numbers (num2words): num_to_words(n) -> cardinal English, num_to_ordinal_words(n) -> ordinal words. NULL -> NULL.

extensions.name: ordinal
extensions.description: Ordinal formatting (hand-rolled): ordinal(n) -> '1st','2nd','3rd','11th','21st'. Handles the 11-13 exception and negatives. NULL -> NULL.

extensions.name: nato
extensions.description: NATO phonetic alphabet (hand-rolled): nato(text) spells letters as Alfa/Bravo/... and digits as One/Two/... joined by spaces.

extensions.name: ascii85
extensions.description: Ascii85 / Base85 encode/decode (ascii85): ascii85_encode -> <~...~>, ascii85_decode. Non-UTF-8 decode -> NULL.

extensions.name: quotedprintable
extensions.description: MIME quoted-printable (quoted_printable): qp_encode / qp_decode (robust). Non-UTF-8 decode -> NULL.

extensions.name: unitconv
extensions.description: Physical unit conversion (hand-rolled): unit_convert(value, from, to) for length, mass, and temperature. Cross-category / unknown unit -> NULL.

extensions.name: wordwrap
extensions.description: Word-wrap text (textwrap): word_wrap(text, width) greedy-fills to a column width, newline separated. Non-positive width -> NULL.

extensions.name: timezone
extensions.description: IANA timezone lookups (chrono-tz): tz_valid, tz_offset_seconds(name, unix_time) (DST-aware), tz_abbreviation. Unknown zone -> NULL/false.

extensions.name: rot13
extensions.description: Caesar-family ciphers (hand-rolled): rot13(text) (self-inverse) and caesar(text, shift). Letters rotate within case; other chars pass through.

extensions.name: leetspeak
extensions.description: Leetspeak transform (hand-rolled): to_leet(text) maps a->4, e->3, i->1, o->0, s->5, t->7, b->8, g->6, l->1.

extensions.name: dms
extensions.description: Geographic coordinate conversion (hand-rolled): dms_to_decimal(deg,min,sec) and decimal_to_dms(decimal) -> D°M'S". Sign-aware.

extensions.name: cbor
extensions.description: JSON <-> CBOR (ciborium, via serde_json::Value): cbor_from_json(json) -> hex, cbor_to_json(hex) -> JSON. DuckDB has JSON but no CBOR. Invalid -> NULL.

extensions.name: msgpack
extensions.description: JSON <-> MessagePack (rmp-serde, via serde_json::Value): msgpack_from_json(json) -> hex, msgpack_to_json(hex) -> JSON. Invalid -> NULL.

extensions.name: elements
extensions.description: Periodic-table lookups by symbol (mendeleev): element_name, element_number (atomic number), element_weight (atomic weight). Unknown -> NULL.

extensions.name: vigenere
extensions.description: Vigenere cipher (hand-rolled): vigenere_encrypt(text, key) / vigenere_decrypt(text, key). Letters enciphered (case preserved); key cycles over letters. Empty key -> NULL.

extensions.name: petname
extensions.description: Memorable random names (petname): petname(words, separator) -> e.g. 'wise-firm-cat'. Nondeterministic (wasi random).

extensions.name: base58check
extensions.description: Base58Check (bs58): base58check_encode(hex) and base58check_decode(text) -> hex, with the Bitcoin-style 4-byte checksum. Invalid -> NULL.

extensions.name: checksums
extensions.description: Non-cryptographic checksums over UTF-8 bytes: crc16 (CRC-16/ARC), adler32, fnv1a_32, fnv1a_64 (crc + adler crates, FNV hand-rolled). Complements crypto/hashfuncs.

extensions.name: siphash
extensions.description: Keyed SipHash-1-3 (siphasher): siphash(key0, key1, text) -> ubigint. Hash-flooding-resistant bucketing. NULL text -> NULL.

extensions.name: tiktoken
extensions.description: OpenAI BPE tokenization (tiktoken-rs, embedded tables, no network): tiktoken_count / tiktoken_encode (JSON ids) / tiktoken_decode for o200k_base, cl100k_base, p50k_base, p50k_edit, r50k_base. Mirrors the standalone tiktoken:tokenizer component in the duckdb:extension world.

extensions.name: bech32
extensions.description: Bech32 encoding (bech32, BIP-173): bech32_encode(hrp, hex), bech32_hrp, bech32_decode_hex, bech32_valid. Invalid -> NULL/false.

extensions.name: uuid5
extensions.description: Namespace UUIDs (uuid): uuid_v5(namespace, name) and uuid_v3(namespace, name), deterministic. namespace is a UUID or alias dns/url/oid/x500. Complements uuidx (v7).

extensions.name: gravatar
extensions.description: Gravatar helpers (md5): gravatar_hash(email) and gravatar_url(email), with the spec's trim+lowercase normalization. NULL -> NULL.

extensions.name: html2text
extensions.description: Strip HTML to readable text (nanohtml2text): html_to_text(html). Decodes entities, renders links. NULL -> NULL.

extensions.name: textstat
extensions.description: Readability statistics (hand-rolled): word_count, sentence_count, syllable_count, flesch_reading_ease, reading_time_minutes (200 wpm). NULL where a ratio is undefined.

extensions.name: hashids
extensions.description: Hashids integer-id obfuscation (harsh): hashids_encode(number, salt) -> YouTube-style id, hashids_decode(text, salt) -> bigint. Undecodable -> NULL.

extensions.name: checkdigit
extensions.description: Verhoeff + Damm check digits (hand-rolled): verhoeff_validate/append, damm_validate/append. Stronger than Luhn (catches all single-digit + adjacent-transposition errors).

extensions.name: dice
extensions.description: RPG dice notation (rand): dice_roll(notation) (random, e.g. '2d6+3'), dice_min/dice_max (deterministic bounds). Bad notation -> NULL.

extensions.name: graycode
extensions.description: Gray code (hand-rolled): gray_encode(n) reflected-binary Gray code, gray_decode(g) inverse. Negative -> NULL.

extensions.name: cardtype
extensions.description: Credit-card brand detection (hand-rolled IIN ranges): card_brand(number) -> visa/mastercard/amex/discover/diners/jcb/unionpay/maestro/unknown. Complements creditcard (Luhn).

extensions.name: money
extensions.description: Currency amount formatting (iso_currency): format_money(amount, code) -> '$1,234.50' / '¥1,000', using the currency symbol + minor-unit count, thousands-grouped. Unknown -> NULL.

extensions.name: ngrams
extensions.description: Character / word n-grams as a JSON array (serde_json): char_ngrams(text, n), word_ngrams(text, n). Works with DuckDB's json_* functions.

extensions.name: stem
extensions.description: Snowball word stemming (rust-stemmers): stem(word, language) for english/french/german/spanish/italian/portuguese/russian/dutch/swedish/norwegian/danish/finnish (default english).

extensions.name: transliterate
extensions.description: Unicode -> ASCII transliteration (deunicode): deunicode(text), e.g. 'Æneid café' -> 'AEneid cafe'. NULL -> NULL.

extensions.name: pluscode
extensions.description: Open Location Code / plus codes (open-location-code): pluscode_encode(lat, lon, length), pluscode_valid, pluscode_decode_lat/lon (area center). Invalid -> NULL/false.

extensions.name: rot47
extensions.description: ROT47 cipher (hand-rolled): rot47(text) rotates the 94 printable ASCII chars by 47, self-inverse. ROT13's punctuation-aware cousin.

extensions.name: stopwords
extensions.description: Stop-word detection + removal (stop-words, stopwords-iso lists): is_stopword(word, language), remove_stopwords(text, language). 11 languages by name or ISO code; unknown -> NULL.

extensions.name: isbnconv
extensions.description: ISBN-10 <-> ISBN-13 conversion (hand-rolled checksums): isbn10_to_13, isbn13_to_10 (978-prefixed only). Complements isbn (validate/normalize). Invalid length -> NULL.

extensions.name: passgen
extensions.description: Random password generation (rand, wasi entropy): gen_password(length) (alphanumeric + symbols), gen_password_alnum(length). Nondeterministic; length clamped 1..256.

extensions.name: braille
extensions.description: Text -> Unicode Braille (hand-rolled grade-1 letters): to_braille(text) maps a-z to the Braille Patterns block; other chars pass through.

extensions.name: toml
extensions.description: TOML <-> JSON (toml, via serde_json::Value): toml_to_json / json_to_toml. DuckDB has JSON but not TOML. json_to_toml needs a top-level object. Invalid -> NULL.

extensions.name: yaml
extensions.description: YAML <-> JSON (serde_yaml, via serde_json::Value): yaml_to_json / json_to_yaml. DuckDB has JSON but not YAML. Invalid -> NULL.

extensions.name: unicodenorm
extensions.description: Unicode normalization (unicode-normalization): nfc / nfd / nfkc / nfkd. For dedup/compare of visually-identical strings with different code-point sequences. NULL -> NULL.

extensions.name: unicodewidth
extensions.description: Grapheme + display-width (unicode-segmentation + unicode-width): grapheme_count (user-perceived chars) and display_width (terminal columns; wide CJK = 2). Distinct from length() (code points).

extensions.name: colorconv
extensions.description: HSL/HSV colour conversions (hand-rolled): hex_to_hsl, hex_to_hsv (h 0-360, s/l/v 0-100), hsl_to_hex. Complements csscolor + color. Bad hex -> NULL.

extensions.name: jsonschema
extensions.description: JSON Schema validation (jsonschema): json_schema_valid(schema, instance) -> bool. Both args JSON text. Malformed JSON or invalid schema -> NULL.

extensions.name: simhash
extensions.description: SimHash locality-sensitive fingerprints (hand-rolled, deterministic): simhash(text) -> 64-bit fingerprint, simhash_distance(a,b) -> Hamming distance. Near-duplicates have small distances.

extensions.name: idextra
extensions.description: Modern sortable/collision-resistant IDs: ksuid() (svix-ksuid), cuid2() (cuid2). Nondeterministic (wasi random+clock). Complements ids (ulid/nanoid) and uuid5/uuidx.

extensions.name: phonetic2
extensions.description: Additional phonetic algorithms (rphonetic): nysiis, refined_soundex, double_metaphone (primary). Complements phonetic (soundex/metaphone).

extensions.name: z85
extensions.description: Z85 / Base85 (ZeroMQ; z85 crate): z85_encode(hex) (input bytes must be a multiple of 4), z85_decode(text) -> hex. Invalid -> NULL.

extensions.name: initials
extensions.description: Initials / acronyms (hand-rolled): initials(text) -> first letter of each word uppercased ('Portable Document Format' -> 'PDF'), initials_dotted -> 'P.D.F.'.

extensions.name: luhngen
extensions.description: Luhn check-digit generation (hand-rolled): luhn_check_digit(partial), luhn_append(partial). Complements luhn (validation). Verified 7992739871 -> 3.

extensions.name: pintest_a
extensions.description: PLAN-prefixes v1.1 pin-test probe A: pin_probe() -> INTEGER returns 111. Pairs with pintest_b (-> 222) under a distinct expansion to make the .prefix prefer/unprefer pin visibly flip.

extensions.name: pintest_b
extensions.description: PLAN-prefixes v1.1 pin-test probe B: pin_probe() -> INTEGER returns 222. Pairs with pintest_a (-> 111) under a distinct expansion to make the .prefix prefer/unprefer pin visibly flip.

extensions.name: atbash
extensions.description: Atbash cipher (hand-rolled): atbash(text) maps a<->z within each case, self-inverse. Non-letters pass through.

extensions.name: piglatin
extensions.description: Pig Latin (hand-rolled): to_pig_latin(text) moves the leading consonant cluster to the end + 'ay' ('way' for vowel-initial). Case of the first letter preserved.

extensions.name: rle
extensions.description: Run-length encoding (hand-rolled): rle_encode(text) -> '3a2b1c', rle_decode inverts it. Malformed decode -> NULL.

extensions.name: bbcode
extensions.description: BBCode -> HTML (hand-rolled): bbcode_to_html maps [b][i][u][s][code][quote], [url=href]text[/url], [img]src[/img]. Unknown tags pass through.

extensions.name: phonenumber
extensions.description: Phone-number validation + formatting (phonenumber, a libphonenumber port with embedded metadata): phone_valid, phone_format (e164/international/national/rfc3966), phone_country_code. region is a 2-letter code; empty for +-prefixed numbers.

extensions.name: pwstrength
extensions.description: Password-strength scoring (passwords crate; pure compute): password_score(pw) -> 0-100, password_strength(pw) -> label. Replaces zxcvbn, which is infeasible on wasip2 (needs a wasm-bindgen time import).

extensions.name: qrcode
extensions.description: QR code generation (qrcode, SVG output): qr_svg(text) -> an SVG document. Data too large for a QR symbol -> NULL.

extensions.name: aggstat
extensions.description: Statistical AGGREGATES DuckDB core lacks (first use of the aggregate capability): harmonic_mean(x). NULL inputs skipped.

extensions.name: bloom
extensions.description: Bloom filter as a DuckDB aggregate + query scalar (not in core): bloom_filter(value) AGGREGATE -> hex filter (8192-bit, k=5), bloom_contains(filter, item) -> bool (no false negatives).

extensions.name: minhash
extensions.description: MinHash set similarity as a DuckDB aggregate + scalar (not in core): minhash(value) AGGREGATE -> 64-slot signature, minhash_similarity(a,b) -> estimated Jaccard.

extensions.name: countmin
extensions.description: Count-Min sketch as a DuckDB aggregate + scalar (not in core): count_min(value) AGGREGATE -> d=4 x w=512 table, cms_estimate(sketch, item) -> estimated frequency (never under-counts).

extensions.name: dns
extensions.description: DNS resolution over the wasi:sockets graft (the host grants extension components outbound network): dns_lookup(host) -> first IP, dns_resolve_all(host) -> JSON array of IPs. Nondeterministic; unresolvable -> NULL.

extensions.name: httpclient
extensions.description: HTTP/HTTPS client over wasi:sockets with pure-Rust TLS (rustls): http_get(url) -> body, http_status(url) -> status code, http_post(url, body) -> response body. Network-gated (DUCKLINK_NETWORK_GRANT). Named httpclient because DuckDB core resolves the name http to built-in httpfs.

extensions.name: lorem
extensions.description: Lorem ipsum placeholder text (lipsum): lorem_words(n), lorem_title(). Nondeterministic.

extensions.name: faker
extensions.description: Fake data generation (fake crate, bundled lists): fake_name, fake_email, fake_username, fake_city, fake_company. Nondeterministic. Useful for seeding test datasets.

extensions.name: passphrase
extensions.description: Diceware passphrase generation (chbs, bundled wordlist): passphrase() -> 'correct horse battery staple'-style. Nondeterministic.

extensions.name: h3
extensions.description: Uber H3 hexagonal geospatial indexing (h3o).

extensions.name: lindel
extensions.description: Space-filling curve linearization: Morton/Z-order + Hilbert encode/decode.

extensions.name: magic
extensions.description: File content-type sniffing from magic bytes (infer).

extensions.name: tsid
extensions.description: Time-sorted unique IDs (Snowflake/TSID style), deterministic encode/decode/timestamp.

extensions.name: rhai
extensions.description: Evaluate a sandboxed Rhai expression as a SQL scalar (rhai).

extensions.name: bitfilters
extensions.description: Xor approximate-membership filter: aggregate build + query scalar (xorf).

extensions.name: prql
extensions.description: Compile PRQL to SQL: prql_to_sql, prql_is_valid (prqlc).

extensions.name: jaq
extensions.description: jq-style JSON query: jq(json,filter), jq_first (jaq interpreter).

extensions.name: cron
extensions.description: Cron expression evaluation (UTC, deterministic): cron_is_valid, cron_next, cron_prev (croner).

extensions.name: xml
extensions.description: XML parse + simple XPath extraction: xml_valid, xml_extract, xml_extract_all (roxmltree).

extensions.name: pinyin
extensions.description: Chinese Hanzi -> pinyin romanization: to_pinyin, to_pinyin_plain, to_pinyin_initials (pinyin).

extensions.name: sqlformat
extensions.description: SQL pretty-printer: sql_format, sql_format_compact (sqlformat).

extensions.name: bencode
extensions.description: BitTorrent bencoding: bencode_to_json, bencode_is_valid (serde_bencode).

extensions.name: maidenhead
extensions.description: Maidenhead grid locator (ham radio): to_maidenhead, maidenhead_lat, maidenhead_lon.

extensions.name: base45
extensions.description: Base45 encoding (RFC 9285): base45_encode, base45_decode (base45).

extensions.name: numfmt
extensions.description: Number formatting: num_group (thousands grouping), num_si (SI/metric prefix).

extensions.name: mailto
extensions.description: Parse mailto: URIs (RFC 6068): mailto_to, mailto_field, mailto_to_json (percent-encoding).

extensions.name: hexdump
extensions.description: Hex dumps: hexdump (canonical hex+ASCII), hex_pretty (space-separated hex).

extensions.name: secp256k1
extensions.description: ECDSA on the secp256k1 curve: secp256k1_pubkey, secp256k1_sign (RFC 6979), secp256k1_verify (k256). BLOB I/O.

extensions.name: bibtex
extensions.description: BibTeX parsing: bibtex_count, bibtex_to_json, bibtex_keys (biblatex). NULL on parse error.

extensions.name: useragent
extensions.description: User-Agent string parsing: ua_browser, ua_browser_version, ua_os, ua_category, ua_is_bot (woothee).

extensions.name: ical
extensions.description: iCalendar (.ics) parsing: ical_event_count, ical_to_json, ical_summaries (ical). Parse error -> NULL.

extensions.name: tdigest
extensions.description: t-digest quantile estimation: aggregate build + tdigest_quantile / tdigest_count query scalars (tdigest).

extensions.name: mlkmeans
extensions.description: ml_kmeans(x, y, k) aggregate: k-means centroids (JSON) computed by Python/numpy on the single resident, shared compose:dynlink pylon provider (mlkmeans).

extensions.name: urlpattern
extensions.description: WHATWG URLPattern matching: url_pattern_test(pattern, url) -> boolean, url_pattern_match -> json named groups (urlpattern).

extensions.name: celestial
extensions.description: Astronomical coordinate conversions: equatorial_to_galactic_l/_b, angular_separation, hms_to_deg, dms_to_deg.

extensions.name: textlines
extensions.description: Split text into rows: split_lines(text) -> table(line_no, line).

extensions.name: netquack
extensions.description: Public-suffix-aware URL/domain parsing: registrable_domain, public_suffix, subdomain, domain_label (psl).

extensions.name: openprompt
extensions.description: Call an OpenAI-compatible LLM HTTP API: prompt, prompt_model (network-gated, rustls over wasi:sockets).

extensions.name: dbf
extensions.description: Read dBASE/.dbf files: read_dbf(data BLOB) -> table(record_no, field, value) melted (dbase).

extensions.name: shapefile
extensions.description: Read ESRI .shp shapefiles: read_shp(data BLOB) -> table(shape_no, shape_type, wkt) (shapefile).

extensions.name: fit
extensions.description: Read Garmin/ANT .FIT files: read_fit(data BLOB) -> table(record_no, kind, field, value) melted (fitparser).

extensions.name: warc
extensions.description: Read WARC web-archive files: read_warc(data BLOB) -> table(record_no, warc_type, target_uri, content_type, content_length) (warc).

extensions.name: html
extensions.description: HTML CSS-selector extraction: html_extract, html_extract_all, html_attr (scraper).

extensions.name: vcard
extensions.description: vCard (.vcf) contact parsing: vcard_count, vcard_to_json, vcard_names (ical).

extensions.name: ini
extensions.description: INI / config parsing: ini_to_json, ini_get, ini_sections (rust-ini).

extensions.name: plist
extensions.description: Apple property-list parsing: plist_to_json(data) -> JSON (XML or binary plist), plist_get(data, key) -> top-level dict value as text (plist crate).

extensions.name: dotenv
extensions.description: Parse .env files: dotenv_to_json(text) -> JSON object {KEY:VALUE}, dotenv_get(text, key) -> value, dotenv_keys(text) -> JSON array of keys (hand-rolled parser; quotes stripped, inline # comments, export prefix).

extensions.name: hocon
extensions.description: HOCON (Typesafe Config) parsing (hocon crate): hocon_to_json(text) -> JSON object, hocon_get(text, path) -> value at a dotted path. Invalid/absent -> NULL.

extensions.name: uuid7
extensions.description: UUIDv7 (RFC 9562, time-ordered), deterministic: uuid7_build(unix_ms, rand_hex) constructs a canonical v7 UUID, uuid7_timestamp extracts the embedded unix-ms, uuid7_is_valid checks v7 well-formedness (uuid crate).

extensions.name: textdiff
extensions.description: Text diffing via the similar crate: text_diff(a, b) -> unified line diff ('' if identical), diff_ratio(a, b) -> similarity ratio [0,1], diff_changed_lines(a, b) -> count of inserted + deleted lines. NULL on NULL input.

extensions.name: polyline
extensions.description: Google Encoded Polyline encode/decode: polyline_encode(coords_json [[lon,lat],...], precision) -> text, polyline_decode(encoded, precision) -> JSON [[lon,lat],...] (polyline crate).

extensions.name: json_schema
extensions.description: JSON Schema validation (jsonschema crate; DuckDB core has only syntax-only json_valid): json_schema_valid(schema, doc) -> boolean, json_schema_errors(schema, doc) -> JSON array of error messages ('[]' if valid). NULL on NULL/unparseable input.

extensions.name: stochastic
extensions.description: Probability-distribution scalars (statrs crate; DuckDB has aggregate stats but no distribution PDF/CDF): normal_cdf/normal_pdf/normal_quantile, binomial_pmf, poisson_pmf, exponential_cdf, beta_cdf. NULL on NULL/invalid params.

extensions.name: ion
extensions.description: Amazon Ion (typed JSON superset) conversion (ion-rs): ion_to_json(data) -> JSON (text or binary Ion), ion_from_json(json) -> Ion text, ion_get(data, field) -> top-level struct field. NULL on parse error.

extensions.name: textplot
extensions.description: Terminal/text visualization: plot_sparkline(nums_json) -> unicode sparkline, plot_bars(nums_json, width) -> ascii bar chart, qr_utf8(text) -> QR code as UTF-8 blocks (qrcode crate). NULL on bad input.

extensions.name: marisa
extensions.description: Trie-backed string set/prefix lookup (fst crate): fst_contains(terms_json, key) -> bool, fst_prefix(terms_json, prefix) -> JSON array of matches, fst_count(terms_json) -> distinct count. NULL on bad input.

extensions.name: frequentitems
extensions.description: Top-K heavy-hitters over a JSON array (exact, deterministic): top_k(values_json, k) -> JSON [{value,count}], top_k_value(values_json, k) -> JSON array of the K most frequent values. NULL on bad input/k<=0.

extensions.name: sqlitewasm
extensions.description: SQLite scanner: the SQLite C library compiled to wasm INSIDE the component (rusqlite bundled), behind the WIT boundary. sqlite_blob_scan(hex_db, table) melts a SQLite database (passed as a hex string) into (row_no,col,val) rows; the component also backs the storage/pushdown-scan WIT interface (attach-blob + projection/filter/limit scan) used for ATTACH. Demonstrates delivering a heavy C library as a durable WIT component.

extensions.name: jsonfns
extensions.description: Official `json` extension scalar surface as a loadable component (serde_json + serde_json_path), so json can be de-embedded from the lean core: json_valid/json_extract/json_extract_string/json_array_length/json_type/json_keys/json_contains/json_quote/to_json. Auto-loaded by default on the lean core.

extensions.name: inetfns
extensions.description: Official `inet` extension functions as a loadable component (ipnetwork + std::net): host/family/netmask/network/broadcast/inet_contains. Replaces embedded inet on the lean core.

extensions.name: excelfns
extensions.description: Official `excel` extension reader as a loadable component (pure-Rust calamine): xlsx_sheets + a melted read_xlsx over a BLOB + xlsx_cell. Replaces embedded excel on the lean core.

extensions.name: avrofns
extensions.description: Official `avro` extension reader as a loadable component (pure-Rust apache-avro): avro_schema + a melted read_avro over a BLOB + avro_record_count. Replaces embedded avro on the lean core.

extensions.name: spatialfns
extensions.description: Subset of the official spatial extension's ST_* functions as a loadable component (geo+wkt+geojson; WKT text I/O): ST_Point/GeomFromText/AsText/X/Y/Distance/Area/Length/Centroid/Contains/Within/Intersects/Envelope/AsGeoJSON. Not full parity (no GEOMETRY type / GDAL-PROJ / R-tree index).

extensions.name: ftsfns
extensions.description: Full-text-search function layer as a loadable component (rust-stemmers): fts_tokenize, fts_stem, fts_stem_text, bm25_score (Okapi BM25 term score), fts_match. The create_fts_index PRAGMA (index+macros) needs core integration and is not covered.

extensions.name: icufns
extensions.description: ICU function layer as a loadable component (ICU4X icu_collator): icu_sort_key (locale collation sort key for ORDER BY), icu_compare (locale-aware compare), icu_casefold. Real COLLATE collations + TIMESTAMPTZ need new WIT surfaces (infra).

extensions.name: vssfns
extensions.description: Vector functions the core lacks, as a loadable component: vec_l1_distance (Manhattan), vec_linf_distance (Chebyshev), vec_normalize. The L2/cosine/dot distances are already in core_functions; vss's HNSW index needs a custom-index WIT surface (infra).

extensions.name: rtreefns
extensions.description: Spatial R-tree index on the custom-index capability (rstar): CREATE INDEX ... USING wasm_rtree over a FLOAT[4] bbox column; rtree_search(index, bbox_json, limit) -> intersecting rowids; bbox4(wkt) -> bbox JSON. Proves the index capability is general (same WIT serves HNSW point-kNN and R-tree bbox-intersection).

extensions.name: hnswfns
extensions.description: HNSW vector index on the custom-index capability (instant-distance): CREATE INDEX ... USING wasm_hnsw over a FLOAT[N] column; the query planner auto-rewrites ORDER BY array_distance(col,q) LIMIT k to use it; hnsw_search(index, query, k) explicit kNN.

extensions.name: geomtype
extensions.description: Custom GEOMETRY logical type via register-logical-type + casts: a geom2 type (WKB/BLOB physical) with VARCHAR<->geom2 WKT casts and geom_area/geom_astext typed scalars (geo+wkt). Demonstrates the custom-type + cast capability.

extensions.name: spatialproj
extensions.description: Coordinate reprojection via the single resident, shared compose:dynlink gdal provider (runtime DI, not wac-composed): a thin duckdb:extension that resolves the resident gdal provider and invokes its transform method (GDAL/PROJ, embedded proj.db loaded ONCE). ST_Transform(wkt, from_srid, to_srid) -> reprojected WKT.

extensions.name: tpchgen
extensions.description: TPC-H benchmark data + query text (componentizes official tpch; tpchgen crate): tpch_region/nation (fixed) + tpch_supplier/customer/part/partsupp/orders/lineitem(sf) generators + tpch_query(n) -> the 22 query texts.

extensions.name: tpcdsgen
extensions.description: TPC-DS reference data (componentizes official tpcds; hand-rolled): tpcds_income_band (20 fixed bands) + tpcds_date_dim_sample (arithmetic date_dim). Full dsdgen parity needs the C generator.

extensions.name: deltascan
extensions.description: Delta Lake metadata reader (componentizes official delta): delta_log_info(log_json) -> the _delta_log actions, delta_schema(log_json) -> columns. Full delta_scan composes the add-file list with read_parquet (needs host file access).

extensions.name: icebergscan
extensions.description: Apache Iceberg metadata reader (componentizes official iceberg): iceberg_metadata/iceberg_schema/iceberg_snapshots over metadata.json. Full read composes manifests via avrofns + read_parquet (needs host file access).

extensions.name: autocomplete
extensions.description: SQL autocompletion (componentizes official autocomplete): sql_complete(partial) -> last-token-prefix matches over SQL keywords PLUS live catalog table + column names (via a new query host import; served from a host-side catalog snapshot to avoid table-function re-entrancy). kind = keyword|table|column.

extensions.name: statsduck
extensions.description: Statistical hypothesis tests + distributions (componentizes KoliStat/the-stats-duck): ttest_1samp/2samp/paired, mann_whitney_u, wilcoxon_signed_rank, sign_test, pearson/spearman_test, anova_oneway, chisq_goodness_of_fit/independence, jarque_bera, ks_test_2samp, adjust_p (bonferroni/holm/BH/BY), + t/chisq/f/gamma/weibull/lognormal CDFs. Samples in as JSON arrays; {statistic,p_value,...} out as JSON. statrs for the p-value CDFs. Plus Shapiro-Wilk/Anderson-Darling/1-sample KS/Kendall tests, poibin_cdf, and table fns lm/lm_summary/corr_matrix/table_one/bin_edges.

extensions.name: math
extensions.description: Cross-dialect math scalars not provided by DuckDB builtins: exp2 (2^x), e() (Euler's number), rand() (uniform [0,1)), div(x,y) (integer division), truncate(x)/truncate(x,n) (truncate toward zero / to n places). The trig/log/rounding family lives in DuckDB's core_functions.

extensions.name: text_utils
extensions.description: Cross-dialect string scalars not provided by DuckDB builtins: sql_normalize (parameterize a SQL string), insert (MySQL INSERT()), locate(substr,str) / locate(substr,str,start) (MySQL LOCATE(), 1-based). position/split_part/lcase/ucase/split/string_split/str_split/reverse are DuckDB builtins; the `prefixes` table function stays DB-private.

extensions.name: chrono
extensions.description: Cross-dialect datetime scalars not provided by DuckDB builtins: the MySQL/BigQuery/Snowflake date+timestamp spellings (from_unixtime, timestampdiff/add, adddate/subdate, makedate/maketime, to_char, str_to_date, parse_*/format_*, timestamp_*/datetime_* family, unix_*, date_from_unix_date, date_bucket, from_days), tz-convert, duration parse/format, business-day math, and the date_iso_week/year named spellings. DuckDB's own year/month/day/date_part/date_trunc/date_diff/epoch/make_*/age/now/last_day/to_timestamp/time_bucket builtins are NOT re-registered.

extensions.name: list
extensions.description: JSON-array-backed list scalars not provided by DuckDB builtins: array_remove, list_length, the array_* reductions (min/max/sum/product/avg/count), array_dims/lower/upper/ndims, array_positions, array_replace, arrays_overlap. Carrier is TEXT containing a JSON array. DuckDB's native-LIST list_*/array_* family and array_to_json/array_intersect builtins are NOT re-registered.

extensions.name: stdsql
extensions.description: Cross-dialect standard-SQL scalars not provided by DuckDB builtins: space, initcap, the ClickHouse camelCase family (startsWith/endsWith/lengthUTF8/lowerUTF8/upperUTF8/toString/empty/notEmpty/replaceAll/positionUTF8), and the PostgreSQL to_bin/to_oct/to_ascii/quote_ident/quote_literal/quote_nullable/get_byte/set_byte. DuckDB's greatest/least/left/right/lpad/rpad/repeat/translate/to_hex/bit_length/chr/ascii/char_length/from_hex/get_bit/set_bit builtins are NOT re-registered, and `if` stays DuckDB's CASE syntax.

extensions.name: stats
extensions.description: Percentile aggregates not provided by DuckDB's plain catalog: percentile(value, p), percentile_cont(value, p), percentile_disc(value, p), all with p in 0..100. DuckDB's percentile_cont/disc are WITHIN GROUP ordered-set syntax; its stddev/variance/median/mode/corr/covar/regr_*/skewness/kurtosis/bit_*/any_value/array_agg/string_agg aggregates are NOT re-registered.

extensions.name: sys_compat
extensions.description: DB-identity / system scalars not provided by DuckDB builtins: system_user(), database(), schema(), collation(text), returning DuckDB-appropriate constants. DuckDB's version()/current_user/session_user/user/current_role/current_database()/current_schema()/current_schemas()/format_bytes() builtins are NOT re-registered. DB-private (engine identity, not portable shared logic).

extensions.name: talib
extensions.description: TA-Lib technical indicators (sma/ema/rsi) as aggregate + window functions driven by DuckDB's window machinery (shared datalink talib-core).

extensions.name: minijinja
extensions.description: Jinja2-style templating: jinja_render(template, context_json) -> text, jinja_valid(template) -> boolean (minijinja crate).

extensions.name: tera
extensions.description: Jinja2/Django-style templating: tera_render(template, context_json) -> text, tera_valid(template) -> boolean (tera crate).

extensions.name: pcap
extensions.description: Read PCAP/PCAPNG capture files: read_pcap(data BLOB) -> table(idx, ts_sec, ts_usec, caplen, origlen, data) one row per packet (pcap-parser crate).

extensions.name: a5
extensions.description: A5 pentagonal DGGS global geospatial index: a5_lonlat_to_cell(lat, lon, res), a5_cell_to_lat/lon, a5_cell_to_resolution, a5_cell_to_parent, a5_is_valid_cell, a5_cell_to_hex / a5_hex_to_cell (a5 crate).

extensions.name: jsonata
extensions.description: JSONata query/transform: jsonata(expr, json) -> text. Evaluates a JSONata expression against a JSON document and returns the result as JSON (jsonata-core crate).

extensions.name: sqlitecompat
extensions.description: SQLite built-in scalars DuckDB lacks (#153 cross-compat, SQLite->DuckDB): zeroblob(n), randomblob(n), likely(x), unlikely(x), likelihood(x,prob). DuckDB ships instr/unicode/printf/hex/typeof itself; only the genuine gaps are exposed here.

extensions.name: ducklink_native
extensions.description: Curated native DuckDB extension bundle: perf-sensitive scalars (ABA, IBAN, ISBN, Luhn, credit-card) compiled directly against duckdb-rs. Companion to the WASM-based ducklink loader — same pure-logic crates as each component's WASM version, native speed, no sandbox. Use for tight-loop scalar work; use ducklink's WASM modules when portability/sandboxing/dynamic-load matter more.

dotcmds.name: core
dotcmds.description: Built-in dot commands ported as a pluggable component: introspection (.tables/.schema/.indexes/.count/.columns) over the live connection plus output-mode toggles (.json/.csv/.box).

dotcmds.name: greet
dotcmds.description: Reference dot-command component demonstrating the duckdb:dotcmd world: .greet [NAME].

dotcmds.name: duckdb-utils-schema
dotcmds.description: sqlite-utils schema commands ported to DuckDB: create/drop/rename/duplicate tables, views, indexes, add/transform columns, add/index foreign keys (via table rebuild), and extract columns into a lookup table.

dotcmds.name: duckdb-utils-data
dotcmds.description: sqlite-utils data commands ported to DuckDB: ingest json/csv/tsv/parquet, upsert, per-column stats, convert columns, store files as BLOBs, load a file as a queryable temp table, and run set-based bulk SQL over a file.

dotcmds.name: duckdb-utils-fts
dotcmds.description: sqlite-utils FTS commands ported to DuckDB's fts extension: enable/disable/rebuild a full-text index and BM25 search.

dotcmds.name: duckdb-utils-maint
dotcmds.description: sqlite-utils maintenance commands adapted to DuckDB: vacuum, analyze, checkpoint, and database-size reporting.

dotcmds.name: secp256k1
dotcmds.description: ECDSA on secp256k1: secp256k1_pubkey, secp256k1_sign (RFC6979), secp256k1_verify (k256), BLOB I/O.

dotcmds.name: useragent
dotcmds.description: User-Agent parsing: ua_browser, ua_browser_version, ua_os, ua_category, ua_is_bot (woothee).

dotcmds.name: tdigest
dotcmds.description: t-digest quantile estimation: aggregate build + tdigest_quantile/tdigest_count scalars (tdigest).

dotcmds.name: shapefile
dotcmds.description: Read ESRI .shp shapefiles: read_shp(data BLOB) -> table(shape_no, shape_type, wkt) (shapefile).

dotcmds.name: fit
dotcmds.description: Read Garmin/ANT .FIT files: read_fit(data BLOB) -> table(record_no, kind, field, value) melted (fitparser).

dotcmds.name: warc
dotcmds.description: Read WARC web-archive files: read_warc(data BLOB) -> table(record_no, warc_type, target_uri, content_type, content_length) (warc).

dotcmds.name: html
dotcmds.description: HTML CSS-selector extraction: html_extract, html_extract_all, html_attr (scraper).

dotcmds.name: vcard
dotcmds.description: vCard (.vcf) contact parsing: vcard_count, vcard_to_json, vcard_names (ical).

dotcmds.name: ini
dotcmds.description: INI / config parsing: ini_to_json, ini_get, ini_sections (rust-ini).

categories.validators: Identifier + checksum validation (ISIN, IBAN, credit cards, ...)
categories.data-types: Type parsing, extraction, and conversion helpers
